escalation.rationale: Active US-Israel war against Iran with 67,000 US troops deployed, naval attacks in Gulf, and expanding regional conflict involving Lebanon and Houthis.

ticker_items: Iran attacks Kuwaiti oil tanker off Dubai with drone strike
US has 67,000 troops in Iran as war enters day 32
France blocks US aircraft from using airspace for Israel supplies
Israel establishes security zone in Lebanon to Litani River
Houthis enter Iran war, firing missiles at Israel

new_entrant.text: Houthis have entered the Iran war by firing missiles at Israel, expanding the regional conflict.

eastern_europe.description: Russia continues spring offensive with drone and missile attacks on civilian areas
Russia launched spring offensive with 400 drones and multiple missile strikes on civilian areas.

middle_east.description: US strikes Iranian nuclear facilities with 2,000-pound bunker-buster bombs creating massive fireball
Iranian forces strike fully loaded Kuwaiti oil tanker in Persian Gulf
Houthis launch coordinated missile attack on Israel with Iran and Hezbollah
Iran attacked and set fire to a Kuwaiti oil tanker with drone strike.
Iran fired missiles across Middle East as Tehran hit by fresh explosions.

claimed_totals.figure: ~1,937 Iranian dead, ~24 Israeli, ~13 US soldiers, ~27 Gulf states

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: US war objectives would be achieved in 'weeks'
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: Secretary of State

middle_east.text: IDF will hold security zone in Lebanon up to the Litani
middle_east.speaker: Israel Katz
middle_east.title: Defense Minister

middle_east.text: US messages via Witkoff and intermediaries are not negotiations
middle_east.speaker: Abbas Araghchi
middle_east.title: Iranian Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: US will continue blasting Iran into oblivion until Strait of Hormuz is reopened
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Spain closed its airspace to US warplanes involved in Iran operations, escalating friction with Washington. This represents a significant shift in European support for US military operations in the Middle East.

EU diplomats visited Ukraine to mark Bucha massacre anniversary while warning member states to prepare for prolonged energy upheaval from Middle East conflict. Energy damage expected to take a year to repair according to Irish officials.

France blocked US aircraft from using its airspace for military supplies to Israel and refuses to support US-Israeli military actions in Iran. Trump has criticized France calling them unhelpful and promising the USA will remember their stance.

India is doubling down on Russian air defense systems from Tunguska to S-400 while also offering Gulf nations interceptors to shield against Iranian drone attacks. The country continues balancing relationships with both Russia and the West.

Russia is profiting significantly from the Iran war due to surging oil prices and increased energy deals. Nikki Haley warned Russia could be the biggest winner as oil prices rise and Moscow secures new energy partnerships with countries like India.

financial.brent_crude: Rising for fourth day, set for largest monthly gain on record
financial.notes: US gasoline prices hit $4/gallon for first time since 2022 due to Iran war supply disruptions.
